tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is how I first picked it out. You could also have the capo on the 2nd fret 
and play: Am F C G, as someone pointed out in the comment section. :)

Played with capo on 6th fret
All chords relative to capo.

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
How you choose to express yourself[/tab]
                                                  
It's all your own and I can tell 
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          
It comes naturally, it comes naturally[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                       
You follow what you feel inside[/tab]
                                                        
It's intuitive, you don't have to try
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]          
It comes naturally, it comes naturally[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
And it takes my breath away[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
What you do so naturally[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You are the thunder and I am the lightning[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                        
And I love the way you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Know who you are and to me it's exciting[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
When you know it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]             
Everything comes naturally, it comes naturally[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                    
When you're with me baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Everything comes naturally, it comes naturally[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Bay bay baby[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You have a way of moving me[/tab]
                                                 
A force of nature your energy
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]        
It comes naturally, it comes naturally[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
